result:
Recovery complete. The tree is now **clean-and-honest and synced** — remote and local both at `40d983f0`.

## Recovery summary — 2026-07-09 (AM)

**What died:** Nothing mid-step. The 07-08 PM recovery exited `rc=0` and its work was committed; the overnight phase-66 goal loop already committed its own output (`STALE-PHASE-TRIAGE-35-44` ask). The dirty tree was pure benign accumulation. The recurring "OFFLINE MODE / git pull failed" wrapper line is git refusing to rebase-pull over a dirty tree — **not** a network outage (the push just succeeded).

**5 dirty paths, all benign — no code, `.env`, masterplan, or trading-behavior file:**
| Path | Disposition |
|---|---|
| `audit/instructions_loaded_audit.jsonl` (+2) | append-only hook stream → **committed** |
| `audit/pre_tool_use_audit.jsonl` (+39) | append-only hook stream → **committed** |
| `autoresearch/2026-07-09-ERROR-topic08.md` | nightly cron log (transient arXiv 503; retries next night) → **committed** |
| `session_pm_20260708T200006Z.json` (3949 B) | 07-08 PM recovery's now-populated artifact → **committed** |
| `session_am_20260709T053007Z.json` (0 B) | this session's own live output → **left untracked** |

**Actions:** one `chore(away-ops)` recovery commit (`91ff4db7`) + auto-changelog follow-up (`40d983f0`), **pushed manually** to `origin/main` (rc=0, refs synced). Appended `## Recovery -- 2026-07-09 (AM)` to `session_notes.md`. **No** `git checkout/restore/stash`; main-only, no force-push; $0 metered (git/cat/wc/grep only); no subagents; no `.env`/code/masterplan/trading touch; launchctl untouched; no new operator token. All 10 rails honored.

**Expected residual** (both documented, swept by next session): `M pre_tool_use_audit.jsonl` (self-referential — the hook appends on the very git calls that commit it, so it can't fully self-commit) and the 0-byte `session_am` artifact.

**Not started:** Per the recovery mandate, no new masterplan step. The next AM session resumes the calendar with a clean tree — next pending step is **66.2** (66.1 `done`). Open operator asks unchanged in `pending_tokens.json`: `STALE-PHASE-TRIAGE-35-44` (blocks the goal-loop Stop hook), `TEST-TOKEN-62.2`, `METERED-BREACH-RECURRING` (root-caused, fix owned by 66.3), `ENV-LINE-81`; `SETUP-TOKEN` is resolved. Exiting.
